description.ko: 빠르게 솟는 유리 연들이 흰 에너지를 밝은 무지개 카오스틱과 선명한 색수차 궤적으로 굴절시킨다.
description.en: Fast glass kites bend white energy into bright rainbow caustics and sharp chromatic trails.

prompt: PRISM-2 refraction flight across a brilliant sun-white void: a ringless swarm of ultra-clear glass swallowtail kites, split crystal feathers, and tiny beveled light vanes darts upward in a loose spiral, each piece angled as if caught in a sudden optical updraft. Rapid bursts of pure white radiance pass through the moving glass from many off-axis directions, breaking into sharp airborne streams of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint green, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow. The dispersed light paints rainbow caustics as wing-shaped flashes, broken spectral arrows, and bright chromatic fringes trailing from every transparent edge. Bright pure-energy mood, fast kinetic motion, polished glass refraction, crisp internal reflections, low sparse particles, clean luminous space, no tabletop prism, no dark surface, no single straight beam.
